lever_summary: Dense rank-2 F64 sum reduce_window general path. The non-3x3-SAME sum loop (e.g. 2x2 stride 2 VALID sumpool/avgpool) read tensor.elements[idx].as_f64() per window element (Literal materialization). Added a dense fast path that reads the operand from as_f64_slice(), accumulates in f64, and emits new_f64_values, before the unchanged Literal loop. The 3x3-SAME ultra-specialized sub-path is untouched.

alien_graveyard.primitive: dense SoA + stencil/windowed reduction over contiguous typed storage
alien_graveyard.mapping: evaluate the pooling stencil over contiguous native f64 instead of materializing + reading a tagged-union per window element

method: Same-worker comparison on ts2: dense (new_f64_values) operand vs a Vec<Literal>-backed operand run in the same process; identical 2x2 stride 2 VALID sumpool params.
command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- sumpool_256x256_f64 --save-baseline sp

change.lever: eval_reduce_window_rank2_f64_sum gains an as_f64_slice() dense loop (f64 accumulate, new_f64_values output) before the Literal loop; the 3x3-SAME early return and the Literal fallback are unchanged.

isomorphism.ordering: unchanged: same out-position and in-window iteration, same padding skip, same ascending + accumulation from 0.0
isomorphism.value: for dense f64, src[idx] == as_f64().unwrap_or(0.0) (the generic reads as_f64().unwrap_or(0.0)); output via from_f64 (new_f64_values)
isomorphism.errors: same checked_mul/checked_add window/flat overflow checks; gated on as_f64_slice() Some so non-dense F64 uses the Literal loop

validation.name: dense_sumpool_parity
validation.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib --release reduce_window
validation.result: passed: 30 tests incl dense_f64_reduce_window_sum_matches_generic (2x2 VALID, 3x2 VALID, 2x3 SAME; NaN/+-inf/-0; dense vs Literal/generic by bits)

validation.name: clippy_deny_warnings
validation.command: rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --release --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings
validation.result: passed (release dodges shared-target proc-macro rmeta drift in debug)
